caption: A group of people perform martial arts in a large, dimly lit indoor hall with a blue carpet and ornate ceiling chandeliers. Several practitioners are dressed in traditional loose-fitting attire, including white and red uniforms. A man in a blue tunic and pants is the focal point, executing a series of dynamic movements. He begins by extending his right arm forward while standing. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his weight, pulling his arm back and pivoting his body. He concludes the series of motions by lunging deeply to his right with his legs spread wide, swinging his arm across his torso in a powerful strike. In the background, other practitioners in white and red clothing mirror various poses, while a seated audience watches from the perimeter of the room. No text or logos are visible on screen.
